name: GER40_M15_DonchianTrendBreakout
hypothesis: GER40 M15 Donchian(20) breakouts filtered by ADX>22 (trending regime) during European/US cash sessions capture sustained directional moves, yielding PF>=2.0 and DD<15%.

regime_filter.notes: Only trade when ADX confirms trending regime.

entry_rules.long: Close > Donchian(20).upper of prior bar AND EMA(50) > EMA(200) AND ADX(14) > 22
entry_rules.short: Close < Donchian(20).lower of prior bar AND EMA(50) < EMA(200) AND ADX(14) > 22

exit_rules.trailing: After +1.5 ATR, trail stop at Donchian(10) opposite extreme

falsifier: If <200 trades over 3yr or PF<1.5, kill branch. Also kill if DD>18%.
